name: Elwood's Southern Fried Dill Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together 2 eggs and 1/4 cup flour with milk, worcestershire sauce, hot sauce, cayenne pepper, Mrs. Dash, and Garlic Powder.
2. In another bowl, mix cornmeal, 2 cups flour, salt, and pepper.
3. Dip the drained pickles into the egg mixture, then dredge them in the flour mixture.
4. Heat vegetable oil to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (175 degrees Celsius).
5. Carefully lower the pickles into the hot oil using tongs or a slotted spoon.
6. Fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
7. Remove the pickles with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve immediately with additional salt and pepper if desired. Also works great with pepperoncinis!
